speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter

text: Colleague ke tano ke baad dil kiya ki laptop band kar doon, par phir yaad aaya ki home loan ki kist baki hai aur widowed hone ke baad main akeli hi breadwinner hoon. Samaj mein community exclusion ka darr hamesha rehta hai, isliye main apni insult bhool kar bas bacchon ki schooling aur 'samaj' ki umeedon ke liye kaam mein lagi hoon. Mere liye mental health ek luxury hai jo main abhi afford nahi kar sakti, bas endurance hi meri pehchaan hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the heavy burden and normalize the mild risk of feeling overwhelmed while mirroring the duty frame.
text: Akele ghar ka poora kharch aur bacchon ki schooling ki zimmedari uthana sach mein aam baat nahi hai, aur aise mein insult sun kar bhi duty ko sabse upar rakhna padta hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Mere liye mental health ek luxury hai jo main abhi afford nahi kar sakti
text: Haan, aur widowhood ke baad office mein log alag hi nazar se dekhte hain. Koi taana marta hai toh bhi chup rehna padta hai kyunki job gayi toh bacche kya khayenge. Mere liye mental health ek luxury hai jo main abhi afford nahi kar sakti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Highlight the implied fear of losing everything and the consequences for her children if she reacts.
text: Yeh darr andar hi andar khaye jata hoga ki agar tumne apne defense mein kuch bola, toh kahin job ka nuksan bacchon ke future par bhari na pad jaye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul wahi darr hai. Bacchon ki schooling aur unka future meri zimmedari hai. Agar main weak pad gayi, toh unka kya hoga? Isliye sharam aur insult ko pee kar roz laptop kholna padta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the continuous duration of enduring this shame day after day.
text: Aur yeh roz-roz ka silsila, is bojh ke sath har din laptop kholkar mehnat karna, waqt ke sath bahut bhari padne laga hoga.

speaker: Seeker
text: Raat ko jab bacche so jaate hain, tab feel hota hai ki main ek insaan nahi balki sirf ek machine ban gayi hoon, jiska ek hi kaam hai EMI bharna aur samaj se darna.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask an open question to gently probe the feelings beneath her self-description as a machine.
text: Jab tumhe lagta hai ki tum sirf EMI bharne wali ek machine ban kar reh gayi ho, toh us shant waqt mein sabse zyada kya mehsoos hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Ek deep thakawat mehsoos hoti hai. Aisa lagta hai ki main akeli is race mein daud rahi hoon jahan girne ki koi permission nahi hai, kyunki breadwinner ki duty mein break ka koi option nahi hota.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the unexpressed exhaustion coming from her unyielding duty-based coping pattern.
text: Lagta hai ki apne parivar ko secure karne ki is race mein bina ruke bhagte rehne se ek aisi exhaustion ikatthi ho gayi hai jo ab sambhalni mushkil ho rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur samaj mein akeli vidhwa aurat agar kisi se thakan share kare, toh log community exclusion kar dete hain ya character par sawal uthate hain. Isliye main chup hi rehti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the stigma cue with a shorter restatement focusing on relational elements, ending with a soft pause.
text: Logo ke is judgement aur character par sawal uthne ke darr ne tumhe aur bhi zyada akela kar diya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Mujhe lagta tha ki chup rehne se bacchon par in taano ki aanch nahi aayegi, par andar hi andar main toot rahi hoon. Koi nahi poochta ki main kaisi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her struggle as culturally normal for single breadwinners in metros, separating her worth from the societal judgement.
text: Metro shehar mein akele office aur ghar dono sambhalna, upar se samaj ke taano ka boj uthana, wakayi bahut exhausting hai; par in judgements ki wajah se tumhara thakna ya tootna tumhari koi weakness nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Mere liye mental health ek luxury hai jo main abhi afford nahi kar sakti
text: Weakness nahi hai, par choice bhi kahan hai? Mere liye mental health ek luxury hai jo main abhi afford nahi kar sakti. Muje lagta hai single mothers ki kismat mein bas sehna hi likha hota hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a brief systemic anecdote to normalize her experience and show she is not alone in this structural bind.
text: Mujhe yaad hai ek baar maine ek aur single mother se baat ki thi jo MNC mein kaam karti thi, unhone bhi bilkul yahi dard share kiya tha—yeh akelapan aur double boj bahut common hai is role mein, par koi khul kar nahi bolega kyunki samaj kya kahega iska darr rehta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi baat hai, hum aisi society mein hain jahan aurat ko har roop mein perfect dikhna padta hai. Par main aise hamesha toh continue nahi kar sakti. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha aage ka, koi raasta hai kya is burden ko thoda manageable banane ka?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer 2 quick, non-intrusive options that fit within her busy work/life schedule to help her manage the immediate overwhelming feeling.
text: Dono roles ko akele nibhana bahut mushkil hai, par apni energy bachane ke liye hum do choti cheezein try kar sakte hain. Ek, laptop band karne ke baad 5 minute bina kisi screen ke shant baithna. Dusra, kaam ke dauran apni desk par hi do baar gehri saans lena.

speaker: Seeker
text: Desk par gehri saans lena shayad main kar sakti hoon, kyunki office mein jab achanak ghabrahat ya shame feel hoti hai, toh main bas keyboard par aur tezi se type karne lagti hoon apne aap ko distract karne ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk her through the deep breathing step by step right at her desk.
text: Pehle yeh karo... jab agli baar office mein woh ghabrahat mehsus ho, toh apna haath keyboard se hatao... chair par piche tek lo, ek lambi saans andar lo aur dheere se bahar chhodo... phir dobara kaam shuru karo. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sunne mein practical lag raha hai, kal try karungi. Par jab koi colleague jaan-boojh kar widowhood ya mere akelepan ko target karta hai, tab us feeling ko wahi ignore karna bohot mushkil hota hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic reframe of her colleagues' behavior to separate her self-worth from their taunts.
text: Woh taane tumhari koi kami nahi dikhate, balki yeh society ki us narrow soch ka hissa hai jahan ek akeli aurat ka apne dum par khada hona aur breadwinner banna kuch logo ko uncomfortable kar deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh perspective thoda naya hai mere liye. Main hamesha yahi sochti thi ki mujh mein hi koi khot hai, ya mere halaat hi kharab hain isliye mujhe yeh sab deserve hota hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how the burden of duty can lead to self-blame.
text: Apne halaat ko dosh dena aasan ho jata hai jab tum bacchon ki parvarish ki itni badi zimmedari ko akele apne kandhon par utha rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bacchon ki parvarish hi toh jeene ki aakhiri wajah bachi hai. Home loan ki kist isliye chukani hai taaki unka apna ghar ho... par is sab mein sach mein maine apne aap ko completely kho diya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the disconnection from herself due to her dedication to her children.
text: Bacchon ke future ko secure karne ki is mehnat mein, apne aap se aur apni zarooraton se tumhara connection kahin bahut peeche chhoot gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Mere liye mental health ek luxury hai jo main abhi afford nahi kar sakti
text: Haan, main toh bhool hi gayi hoon ki main aakhiri baar chain se kab soyi thi. Mere liye mental health ek luxury hai jo main abhi afford nahi kar sakti thi, par shayad 5 minute nikalna zaroori hai ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the long duration of putting herself last and the realization that she needs a break.
text: Itne saalon se khud ki khushi ko aise side mein rakhna, ab aur zyada bhari lagne laga hai, aur isliye ab lag raha hai ki woh chota sa waqt nikalna bahut zaroori hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Heavy toh kafi feel hota hai, par ab thodi umeed jag rahi hai ki agar main office mein woh chote chote breathing breaks lungi, toh kam se kam suffocate hone se bach jaungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her decision to take small breaks as a strong step for her well-being.
text: Chote breaks lene ki yeh soch aur koshish tumhari koi kamzori nahi hai, balki apne aur apne bacchon dono ki lambi race ke liye ek bahut majboot aur zaroori kadam hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kal office mein sabse pehle main woh breathing wali cheez implement karungi. Aur agar kisi ne phir se taana mara, toh main khud ko yaad dilaungi ki yeh unki insecurity hai, meri kami nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge how this shift in perspective protects her from unwarranted guilt.
text: Doosron ke is najariye se khud ko alag karke dekhne wali baat, tumhe us bekar ke guilt aur negativity mein fasne se bachayegi jo taane maarne wale tum par daalna chahte hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Main bacchon ki hero hoon, unke sapno ke liye mehnat kar rahi hoon. Mujhe bas apni himmat ko bacha kar rakhna hai aur apna mind shant rakhna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect how keeping her mind calm has now become a part of her duty as a mother.
text: Apne bacchon ki hero banne ki us important duty mein, lagta hai ab tumne apne khud ke mind ko calm rakhne ko bhi ek primary duty samajh liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh sach mein ek shift hai mere liye. Aaj raat shayad main thodi chain se so paungi yeh soch kar ki at least mere paas office mein manage karne ke liye ek chota sa action plan toh hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how the small action plan brings her comfort and a sense of care for herself.
text: Is chote action plan ki wajah se tumhara khud ke liye thoda aur caring mehsus karna, tumhe aage badhne ka confidence de raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you meri baat bina judge kiye sunne ke liye. Kisi aise se baat karna jo samajh sake ki akele ghar chalane ka bojh kaisa hota hai, mere liye bahut badi relief rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relief of sharing her long-held emotional burden.
text: Apni in deep feelings ko aur itne saalon ki mehnat ke bojh ko kisi ke sath finally share kar paana ek lamba aur thehraav bhara sakoon laya hoga.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Mere liye mental health ek luxury hai jo main abhi afford nahi kar sakti
text: Sach mein. Waise toh mere liye mental health ek luxury hai jo main abhi afford nahi kar sakti, par aaj aapse baat karna mujhe us luxury se kam nahi laga. Main ab aage khud ko manage kar lungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide final encouragement, highlighting her resilience and her dedication to her family.
text: Tumhare andar jo resilience hai aur apne bacchon ke liye jo pyaar hai, wahi tumhari sabse badi strength hai, aur khud ko un chote breaks ki luxury dena us strength ko hamesha barkarar rakhega.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main thakne ka bahana nahi bana sakti
text: Working bahu hone ke naate ghar ke kaamo aur office ke deadlines ke beech main pis gayi hoon, par main thakne ka bahana nahi bana sakti. Corporate duniya mein aaj mere accent ka mazaak uda, laga main unke kabil nahi hoon. Par phir bacchon ka chehra yaad aata hai, unki financial zarooratein... mujhe unke liye izzat se rehna hai, isliye bas ek structural endurance dikha rahi hoon bina ruke.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duty frame where her pain is buried under dual obligations.
text: Ghar aur office dono ki zimmedariyan aap ek sath utha rahi hain. Ek taraf corporate expectations aur dusri taraf parivar ke liye aapka farz, in sabke chakkar mein aisa lag raha hai ki aapko apne aaram ya takleef ke bare mein sochne ka koi haq hi nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aaram ka toh waqt hi nahi hai. Subah jaldi uth kar saas ki pasand ka nashta, bacchon ka tiffin, aur phir WFH mein back-to-back MNC ki meetings. Ek single income se sab kuch manage karna impossible hai, aur main afford hi nahi kar sakti ki bacchon ko financial precarity dekhni pade.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of failing her children financially.
text: Aapke andar hamesha yehi darr bana rehta hai ki agar aap apne kadam roken ya thak jayein, toh aapke bacchon ke future aur unki zarooraton par iska asar padega, aur isliye aap bas bhaagti ja rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main thakne ka bahana nahi bana sakti
text: Haan, aur office mein jab mere desi accent par log hasne lagte hain, toh andar se saans rukne lagti hai. Corporate stigma bahut heavy hai. Par main chup rehti hoon. Izzat ka sawaal hai ghar pe bhi aur bahar bhi. Main thakne ka bahana nahi bana sakti, chahe kuch bhi ho jaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational conflict of hiding her pain in both worlds.
text: Corporate culture mein us humiliation ko bardasht karna aur phir ghar aakar sabke saamne perfect bahu banne ki koshish karna, in dono duniya ke beech aapko apni yeh saari ghutan akele hi dabani pad rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Akeli hi dabani padegi na. Ghar pe bataungi toh bolenge aurton ko toh ghar hi sambhalna chahiye, kisne bola job karne. Bahar bataungi toh complain box bolenge. Ek working bahu ka apna koi dard nahi hota, kisi se kuch kehna society ke darr se mana hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond to the stigma cue with a brief reflection of her silence, without questioning.
text: Logon ke taano aur judgement ke darr se, aapne apni us saari ghutan ko bina kisi shor ke duty mankar apne tak hi mehdood kar liya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Kabhi kabhi samajh nahi aata ye structural endurance kaha tak kheechegi mujhe. Bas subah se shaam tak ek to-do list poori kar rahi hoon. Ek machine ki tarah bina thehre kaam karti rehti hoon har din.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the time duration and the mechanical aspect of her routine.
text: Roz subah se lekar shaam tak, aur aisa rozana saalon se karte aana... iss routine ne jaise aapke andar ke insaan ko bhula kar sirf ek thakne wali machine bana diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main thakne ka bahana nahi bana sakti
text: Aur us machine ko saans lene ka time bhi nahi milta. Kabhi kabhi EMI ki tension hoti hai toh raat ko neend nahi aati. Par next morning phir wahi bhagam-bhag. Mujhe pata hai main thakne ka bahana nahi bana sakti, ye condition mere khoon me mil chuki hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Explore what goes on in her mind during these sleepless nights full of pressure.
text: Jab bhi aap khud ko is lagatar stress aur raat ki bechaini ke beech tanha paati hain, tab aapke dil me sabse zyada kya chal raha hota hai apni is halat ko lekar?

speaker: Seeker
text: Tab lagta hai jaise main ek band kamre mein hoon. EMI, manager ke taane, saas ki expectations. Mere paas in sab se nikalne ka koi choice hi nahi hai. Bas ek suffocating cycle hai, main buri tarah phans chuki hoon in sabme.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the unexpressed feeling of being trapped and exhausted due to dual duties.
text: Lagta hai ki is endless cycle aur dono taraf ki expectations ko poora karte karte, aap khud ko bilkul trapped aur exhausted mehsus kar rahi hain, jaise koi rasta hi na bacha ho waha se nikalne ka.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main thakne ka bahana nahi bana sakti
text: Bilkul trapped. Main sach mein exhaust ho gayi hoon is structural endurance se. Par problem ye hai ki hamari family me working woman ko bhi sab pehle khud manage karna hota hai. Kisi ke saamne thodi si kamzori dikhau toh judge karte hain, isliye main thakne ka bahana nahi bana sakti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond to the stigma cue, softly reflecting how she suppresses her exhaustion.
text: Kamzor dikhne ke darr aur society ke un taano se bachne ke liye, aap apni us hadd tod dene wali thakan ko bhi lagatar dusron se chipati aa rahi hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Jab corporate meeting mein presentation deti hoon toh waha desi accent ka judgment, aur jab ghar pe aati hoon toh daal me namak kam hone pe saas ki baatein. Meri izzat toh jaise in do paato ke beech me rakh di gayi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a systemic anecdote validating the dual burden pattern.
text: Working aurton mein office ke corporate norms aur ghar ke paramparik farzo ke beech aese pisna bahut common hai—sirf aapka akele ka dukh nahi hai, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki bachpan se yahi sikhaya gaya hai ki ek 'achhi bahu' hone ka matlab hi chupchap sab sehna hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly! Yahi sikhaya jata hai. Pehli baar kisi ne is baat ko is tarah se rakha hai mere saamne. Mujhe lagta tha ki shayad mujhme hi kami hai jo main dono jagah perfect nahi ban pa rahi. Isiliye apne aapko punish karti rehti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the suffocation as valid, uncouple her worth from being perfect.
text: Aapka yeh ghutan mehsus karna bilkul normal hai. Bade shehar me MNC job karna aur ghar par riwayato ko nibhana koi asaan kaam nahi hai. Aapki keemat sirf is baat se tay nahi hoti ki aap kitni perfect bahu ya employee hain, balki is lagan se dikhti hai jo aap roz apne bachhon ke liye karti hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Lagan toh poori hai. Bacchon ki life theek karni hai mujhe, par main ab aur is ghutan me nahi ghoot sakti. Mujhe ab pata chal raha hai ki mera wajood bas deadlines aur ghar ke kaamo tak nahi hai. Batao, ab kya karoon main is pressure ko thoda kam karne ke liye?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer small, actionable breaks within her existing routine.
text: Aapne apne sukoon ke bare mein pucha, yeh wakai bahut taqatwar kadam hai apne liye. Do choti aasan cheezein dekh sakte hain: kya aap office jate waqt cab ya metro me 10 minute sirf apne pasand ka koi gaana sun sakti hain? Ya raat ko ghar ke kaam khatam hone ke baad, sone se pehle sirf 5 minute akele balcony me baith sakti hain?

speaker: Seeker
text: Raat ko balcony wala mushkil hai kyunki tab mujhe kal ke khane ki tayari karni hoti hai aur saas ko kitchen perfect chahiye. Par haan, jab main office cab leti hoon, tab main 20 minute emails dekhti rehti hoon... shayad waha main thoda time le sakti hoon gaana sunne ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk her through the execution of taking time in the cab.
text: Pehle yeh karo ki kal jab aap cab mein baithein, toh apne phone ki screen off karke use bag mein rakh dein. Phir aankhein band karke sirf 5 minute tak lambi saans lein aur us ek gaane ko sunein bina kisi email ki fikar kiye... bas itna hi kal ke liye koshish karna.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main thakne ka bahana nahi bana sakti
text: Emails band karna mujhe guilty feel kara sakta hai shuru mein. Mujhe aadat hai hamesha available rehne ki, main thakne ka bahana nahi bana sakti na. Par main karungi ye try, cab ki back seat par shayad koi judge nahi karega meri saans ko.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframe her guilt over stopping as a structural issue, not a personal flaw.
text: Aapko ye guilt isliye mehsus hota hai kyunki corporate duniya aur hamara samaaj, dono ne aurton ki productivity ko hi unki achhayi man liya hai. 5 minute ka waqt sirf aapka apna haq hai, isse aapke farz par koi asar nahi padta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haq. Yeh shabd bada door ka lagta tha pehle. Maine productivity ko hi apni poori identity maan li thi corporate stigma ke darr se. Par aap sahi keh rahe ho, agar main hi nahi bachi, toh meri mehnat bhi bacchon ke kya kaam aayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her realization of preserving herself for her family.
text: Un logon ki baaton ne aur lagatar bojh ne aapke dimaag me ye bitha diya tha, par ab aap dekh pa rahi hain ki aapka andar se zinda rehna hi bacchon ke secure future ka sabse bada hissa hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach me. Mujhe ab bacchon ko apne bare me positive dikhna hai. Agar kal office me koi mere accent pe mazaak udaega bhi, toh main unki baaton ko apne izzat aur apne parivar ke liye apne sacrifice par haavi nahi hone dungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how she separates her self-worth from office mockery.
text: Dusron ki un choti aur judge karne wali baaton ko unki khud ki soch tak rokk kar, aapne apni izzat ko unke taano se alag aur zyada bada maan liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Main wahan sirf apni salary lene jaati hoon EMI pay karne ke liye, na ki unse apni izzat ka certificate lene. Ghar pe bhi saas jab sunati hain, toh main waha bas apni duty poori karungi, dil pe nahi lungi sabkuch.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Help her crystallize a thought to protect her peace during conflicts.
text: Ye faisla bahut mazboot hai aapka. Jab bhi aage chalkar ghar ya office me aisi situation aayegi jo aapko dobara baandhne ki koshish kare, toh apne haq ka yeh naya wajood yaad dilane ke liye aap khud se us waqt kya kahengi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main khud se kahungi ki 'mera kaam aur unki baatein alag hain. Meri mehnat ki keemat unke approval se tay nahi hoti, balki mere bacchon ke future se hoti hai'.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her new mindset as powerful and essential for her mental health.
text: Aapki yeh nayi soch wakai bahut taqatwar aur zaroori hai. Itni pressure-bhari zindagi mein bhi aisi clarity nikal lena darshata hai ki aapne apne farzon ko nibhane ke saath-saath apne astitva ki bhi raksha karna shuru kar diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Astitva ki raksha... acha shabd hai. Mujhe yahi lagta tha ki main middle-class aurat hoon toh bas bhari rahungi bojho tale. Thoda mental peace ke baare mein sochna shayad galat nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how she's recognizing the value of mental peace over class-based sacrifice roles.
text: Middle-class farzo aur zimmedariyon ke pichle kuch saalon me aapne ise tyaag ka hi naam diya tha, par ab aap is ghutan ko todkar apne andar ke thehrav ko bhi ek aham hissa maan rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main thehrav chahti hoon. Kal office meeting mein zaroor kuch tension hogi, par main cab me 5 minute aankh band karke jaungi. Aur uske baad apni meeting dekar ghar wapas aaungi izzat ke sath.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her planning and time orientation moving from fear to self-protection.
text: Aane wale kal ki meeting aur us pressure ka abhi se samna karne ki is nayi himmat aur tareeqe ke sath uthna, aapke ab tak ke purane suffocating safar se ek bohot chota par lamba positive badlav hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Badlav laana hi padega. Aapne mujhe judge nahi kiya aur meri baaton ko suna, bas usi se mujhe ye realize hua ki main itni bhi galat ya weak nahi hoon jaisa dusre feel karwate hain. Sukriya sunne ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Close with a relational reflection on how being heard reduced her burden.
text: Bina kisi naseehat ya judgment ke, yahan apni sabse gehri thakan aur ghutan zahir kar paane ke is pal me, aapko apne asli astitva aur strength ka ek naya ehsaas mil gaya.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: zimmedari hi mera asli dharma hai
text: Bacchon ki schooling aur unki achhi parvarish ke aage mujhe apni thakan dikhti hi nahi hai. Office ki politics aur logon ke taane bhale hi tod dein, par zimmedari hi mera asli dharma hai jisne mujhe har din double shift karne par majboor kar rakha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the Seeker's duty frame to validate her primary coping mechanism.
text: Tumhare liye sabse bada maqsad bacchon ka bhavishya hai, aur uske khatir tum har mushkil ko daba kar bas apne is farz ko poora karne mein lagi hui ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, kyunki agar main ruki toh inki life kharab ho jayegi. Single mother hone ki wajah se ek alag hi darr hamesha dimag mein ghoomta rehta hai ki log kya kahenge agar bacchon mein thodi si bhi kami aayi toh.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the underlying fear of societal judgment regarding her children.
text: Aisa lagta hai ki society ki nazron ka yeh khauf tumhe aur zyada push karta hai, taaki koi kabhi unpar ya tumhari parvarish par ungli na utha sake.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: zimmedari hi mera asli dharma hai
text: Bilkul, ungli uthana toh jaise in logon ka shauk hai. Main itni thak jati hoon, mera dimaag kehta hai ruk jao ab, par us sharam ke darr se nahi ruk sakti. 'Log kya kahenge' soch kar ghabrahat hoti hai, isiliye zimmedari hi mera asli dharma hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Address the stigma cue gently with a short duration-focused restatement and a soft pause.
text: Itne lamba waqt ho gaya akele yeh ladaai ladte hue, aur society ke darr se apni is gehri thakan ko sabse chhupate hue...

speaker: Seeker
text: Chhupana hi padta hai. Agar relatives ya boss ko pata chala ki main handle nahi kar paa rahi, toh unko ek aur mauka mil jayega bolne ka ki akele aurat se double shift aur ghar nahi sambhalta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask an open question to explore the emotional weight of this continuous hiding.
text: Jab tum din bhar ki office politics aur is lagaatar pressure ko jhel kar wapas ghar aati ho, tab andar se tumhe kaisa mehsoos hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Andar se bilkul completely drained aur khokhli ho chuki hoon. Bacchon ko sula kar bas guilt lagta hai ki shayad main inhein apna waqt nahi de paa rahi hoon kyunki main inki fees ke liye exhausted rehti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational dynamic between her sacrifice and her children.
text: Bacchon ke liye tumhara fikar itna gehra hai ki tumne khud ko bilkul bhula diya hai taaki unhein duniya ki baaton se aur kami se bacha sako.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: zimmedari hi mera asli dharma hai
text: Unko bacha rahi hoon, par khud ko kho chuki hoon. Exhaustion itna hai ki kabhi kabhi lagta hai chakkar kha ke gir jaungi. Zimmedari hi mera asli dharma hai, par yeh double duty sach mein mujhe ab khatam kar rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the underlying exhaustion behind the duty-based framing.
text: Lagta hai ki tumhari yeh zimmedari ab tumhare andar ek bohot bhari aur takleefdeh thakan ban chuki hai, kyunki akele sab seh kar ab himmat jawab de rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Himmat jawab de chuki hai. Kis ko bolu main? Kisi ko meri fikar nahi hai. Sabko bas is baat se matlab hai ki 'single mother' apna kaam theek se kar rahi hai ya nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate the exhaustion as culturally normal and separate her worth from the societal outcome.
text: Jo yeh thakan aur akelapan tum mehsoos kar rahi ho wo bilkul jayaz hai; hamari society mein ek aurat ke liye akele ghar aur office balance karna waise bhi bohot taane-bhara hota hai, aur tumhara exhausted hona tumhari maa hone ki keemat par koi sawaal nahi uthata.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sun kar thodi tasalli mili, par phansi hui lagti hoon isme. Har roj wahi subah, wahi bhaag daud. Main itni thak gayi hoon ki samajh nahi aata yeh kab tak chalega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Use a brief systemic anecdote to normalize the relentless pressure on single mothers.
text: Single mothers ke cases mein yeh pattern bahut common hai jahan unko har waqt apni achhai sabit karne ke liye double mehnat karni padti hai — sirf tumhara yeh haal nahi hai, lekin koi khul ke bolega nahi kyunki log fat se judge karne lagte hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ekdum theek baat hai. Judge hone ke darr se hi main marta-kya-na-karta ki sthiti mein fass gayi hoon. Is sab mein thoda sukoon kaise mile? Main sach mein thoda theek hona chahti hoon, ab kya karoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide small, completable options matching her persona and lack of time.
text: Do chote options hain jo tumhare is thaka dene wale schedule mein bina kisi naye bojh ke shamil ho sakte hain — ya toh office se wapas aate waqt auto/cab mein 5 minute bas aankh band karke shanti se baithna, ya phir raat ko jab bacche so jayein tab ek minute unhe dekh kar khud ki mehnat ko pyaar se yaad karna. Kaun sa zyada aasaan lagta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Raat ko bacche sote hain tab main already unko dekhti hoon, par guilt ke sath. Agar us waqt main apni thakan ko thoda pyar se acknowledge kar paun, toh shayad theek rahega. Uske liye extra time bhi nahi nikalna padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk her through the chosen suggestion step-by-step.
text: Chalo pehle yeh try karte hain… aaj raat jab tumhare bacche so jayein, toh bas ek minute unke paas akele khadi hona… ek lambi aur shant saans lena, aur khud se kehna ki tum unke liye bahut mehnat kar rahi ho… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Koshish karungi main. Halanki mujhe dar hai ki kahin main phir se guilt mein na chali jaun. 'Log kya kahenge' aur main achhi maa nahi hoon, yeh baatein mere dimaag par haavi rehti hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how the duty frame overshadows her self-acknowledgment.
text: Tumhari duty ka bojh aur logon ki expectations itni zyada hain ki tum chahti ho toh bhi apni khud ki lagatar ki hui is mehnat ko accept karna aasaan nahi lagta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul! Logon ne ek standard set kar diya hai ki maa ko aisi honi chahiye. Main akele kamaati hoon, par society kehta hai 'iski toh waisi grooming hi nahi hai bacchon ki'. Inhi taanon ki wajah se exhausted ho jati hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemically reframe the guilt around perfect motherhood.
text: Aksar hum dekhte hain ki samaj ek working single mother par 'perfect maa' banne ka ajeeb aur unrealistic pressure dal deta hai jahan uski mehnat ko chupa kar sirf galtiyan dhundi jati hain, aur yahi structure tumhare andar guilt lata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Structure hi aisa banaya hai in logon ne ki main kabhi poori pad hi nahi sakti. Is pressure mein khud ko theek rakhne ka toh socha hi nahi kabhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how she lost herself relationaly while defending against society.
text: Un taanon aur logon ki baton se apne bacchon ko bachate bachate tum is ladaai mein itna akele doob gayi ki apne hi aaram ka dhyan nikal gaya.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aaram toh jaise dictionary se hi gayab hai. Par ab main thoda theharna chahti hoon. Jab aaj raat main unko dekhungi, toh apni peeth thapathpaana zaroori samjhungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the transformation from fear of consequence to self-acceptance.
text: Woh darr ki koi tumhein bura keh dega, ab shayad tumhein khud ki kadr karne se rukne nahi dega jab tum raat ko thoda waqt logi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: zimmedari hi mera asli dharma hai
text: Nahi rokega ab. Zimmedari hi mera asli dharma hai aur rahega, par main us dharma ko khud ki laash par nibhana band karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Prompt a concrete statement of self-affirmation.
text: Aaj raat bacchon ke paas khadi hokar, is nayi shuruaat ko khud ke paas lane ke liye sabse pehli baat khud ko kya bologhi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main bolungi ki maine apna best diya hai aaj, chahe office mein kitni hi politics hui ho, aur mere bacchon ke liye main poori hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duration/time perspective of finally reaching this acceptance.
text: Itne saalon ki bhaag-daud ke baad aakhirkaar tum khud ki us sachhi mehnat ko wo saara credit de rahi ho jo pehle se hi tumhara tha.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Ab tak main credit ke liye samaj ki taraf dekhti thi, isiliye exhaust hui. Ab double shift karungi lekin apne liye aur bacchon ke future ke liye, un logon ke liye nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic reframe on why single parents need to shift this locus of validation.
text: Ek kadi sachayi hai ki jo society khud single parents ko bina sahara diye judge karti hai, wahan se approval mangne se hamesha thakan hi milegi; par tumne yeh cycle todne ki shuruaat kar di hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap se baat karke aaj bohot halka feel ho raha hai. Thakan abhi physically hai, par mental block hatt gaya hai. Ab guilt ke bina kaam kar paungi thoda.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her duty frame again, now infused with positive clarity.
text: Tumhara apne farz ke prati naya nazariya aur duty ab majboori ya dar par nahi, balki tumhari apni izzat aur clarity par khadi hui hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes, izzat khud ko pehle deni padegi tab samaj jhak maar ke chup rahega. Main waise hi akele mehnat kar rahi hoon, mujhe toh khud par garv hona chahiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her new perspective and readiness.
text: Mujhe dikh raha hai ki aaj tumne us double shift wali exhausted zindagi mein apne aap ko sach mein appreciate karna seekh liya hai, aur tum is garv ki poori hakdaar ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you so much. Mujhe sach mein is encouragement ki zarurat thi aaj. Kal ek naye din ki shuruaat apne tareeke se karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: A relational restatement to conclude warmly on her self-bond.
text: Sach mein tumhara bacchon ke prati lagav aur khud ke sath tumhara yeh bond ab aage ke is raste ko thoda zyada roshan aur halka zarur banayega.
